title: After the Milers Cup: Inspiring Courage

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My new running style is slowly starting to
stabilize. I think I'll be able to do some amazing
running someday.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I'm concerned about Zephyr. She seems really
preoccupied over something. I gather up the
courage to ask her what's wrong, and she tells me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There's someone Zephyr looks up to, and she's
doing her best for that person's sake... but she's
hit a wall she can't seem to overcome.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I understand what it feels like to want to do your
best for someone else. I want to do well at the
Yasuda Kinen and give her the courage to run her
best too!
